headline: Former Tesla Booster Now Warns Stock Faces Major Pain in 2025
summary: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management CEO Ross Gerber, a Tesla shareholder, anticipates a 50% plummet in the stock's price this year.

headline: Apple Bows Out of UK's Cloud Encryption Amid Government's 'Backdoor' Demands
summary: Apple has reportedly withdrawn its most secure cloud storage service, Advanced Data Protection (ADP), from the UK after the British government demanded secret access to user data.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: SMCI, Jet.AI, Palantir, OXY And Wall Street Retreats From Record Highs
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Loads Up On Beam Therapeutics, Nu Holdings: Offloads MercadoLibre, Adaptive Biotechnologies
Will Elon Musk's Tesla Team Up With Uber To Roll Out Robotaxis? CEO Dara Khosrowshahi Spills The Beans
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. (NYSE: UBER) CEO, Dara Khosrowshahi, stated that Elon Musk has no plans to integrate Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA)'s forthcoming robotaxis into Uber's platform.

headline: Top Analyst Warns Of Looming Stock Market Correction As S&P 500 Records Biggest Single Day Loss Since December: 'We Could See It Trigger A Larger Sell Off'
summary: Goldman Sachs expert Scott Rubner has cautioned that Wall Street stocks may face a downturn, citing growing instability in the options market

headline: Trump Moves To Impose Tariffs On Countries With Digital Taxes, Defending Apple, Amazon, Meta, Google And Other US Tech Giants
summary: President Donald Trump ordered his trade chief to reopen investigations into digital service taxes imposed on U.S. tech firms.

headline: Tim Cook Reportedly Tells Trump Apple Will Invest 'Hundreds Of Billions' In US: 'They Don't Want To Be In The Tariffs'
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook has reportedly pledged a significant investment in the United States and a shift in manufacturing from Mexico to the U.S.
